calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel Cheryl Grant And Jazmine Hall To Account For Their Actions As Cotrustees; And For Removal Of Cotrustees
Off Calendar Aug-01-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Wade appeared by telephone for Richard Grant (Petitioner).
Sheila Robello for Cheryl Grant and Jazmine Hall (Trustees).

The Court noted that there is an issue with venue and stated that the Trustees are in Solano County and Alameda County. Ms. Robello stated that she filed a declaration, that it is correct that neither of the Trustees reside in San Francisco and that they are administering the Trust from where they live. Mr. Wade stated that he has not seen Ms. Robello's declaration, that he only saw the declaration from Ms. Mayo where she indicated that venue is in San Francisco and is the place of administration, that he has not received an accounting and that he received a check with no explanation. Ms. Robello stated that her Clients gave her a draft accounting, that it was not in the proper format, that she has provided it the her Accountant and that the Accountant is working on it. Ms. Robello also stated that she sent Counsel an escrow statement and a partial distribution for the proceeds based on the shares. The Court stated that all of the issues raised will not be addressed in this Court unless Mr. Wade wants to do something else to establish venue in San Francisco. Mr. Wade questions which County is the proper venue. Mr. Robello stated that either County will be acceptable. The Petition to Compel Cheryl Grant and Jazmine Hall to Account for Their Actions as Co-Trustees, etc. is dismissed for lack of venue without prejudice to re-filing in an appropriate County.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
